note: CBPR+ aggregate pre-validation readiness scorer (chain gate node /ready). Vector 1: all checks pass -> ready=true. Vector 2: UETR invalid -> ready=false. Vector 3: empty-input finite -> ready=false.

vectors.name: fully_ready_payment
vectors.description: Valid IBAN (DE89370400440532013000, mod-97=1), BIC, LEI format, UUIDv4 UETR, and fully-structured CBPR+ address. All 5 checks pass -> ready=true.

output_payload.chain_gate_note: ready=true means this payment instruction passes CBPR+ pre-validation for STP; ready=false means one or more checks failed and remediation is required before submission.
output_payload.pii_note: IBAN, BIC, and LEI are structural payment identifiers, not personal data. All checks are format/structure only. No real party PII processed -- use synthetic identifiers for testing.
output_payload.table_source: SWIFT CBPR+ Structured Address Migration Bulletin (swift.com/cbpr-plus-migration); BIS CPMI d218; ISO 13616:2020 IBAN; ISO 9362:2022 BIC; ISO 17442:2020 LEI; ISO 20022 pacs.008.001.10 (iso20022.org)
output_payload.regulatory_basis: SWIFT CBPR+ Structured Address Migration Bulletin; BIS CPMI d218; ISO 13616 IBAN; ISO 9362 BIC; ISO 17442 LEI; ISO 20022 pacs.008.001.10

vectors.name: not_ready_uetr_invalid
vectors.description: UETR present but not UUIDv4 -> required check fails -> ready=false. Address is hybrid-valid (no silent-fail). IBAN/BIC/LEI not provided (null pass).

uetr.error: UETR "not-a-va..." is not a valid UUIDv4 (8-4-4-4-12 hex, version nibble=4, variant nibble in {8,9,a,b}).

remediation_actions: Generate a new UUIDv4 UETR for this payment instruction (use RFC 4122 version 4 format).

vectors.name: empty_input_finite
vectors.description: All inputs absent. Verifies finite output (no NaN/Infinity). UETR absent + address EMPTY -> both required checks fail -> ready=false, readiness_pct=60.

uetr.error: UETR absent -- required for SWIFT GPI.
